Show me all open orders for a specific c:
-- Replace 'PLCB' with the actual customer name
SELECT OrderNumber, LineNumber, SKU, SKUDesc, OrderQty,
       RequestedShipDate, Plant, OrganizationName
FROM vw_Orders_Base
WHERE CustomerName LIKE '%PLCB%'  -- substitute customer name here
  AND ShipDate IS NULL            -- open orders only
  AND SKU != 'PALLETSLIPCHG'     -- exclude charge lines
ORDER BY RequestedShipDate
Which open orders have a requested ship:
SELECT OrderNumber, LineNumber, CustomerName, SKU, SKUDesc,
       OrderQty, RequestedShipDate, OrganizationName
FROM vw_Orders_Base
WHERE ShipDate IS NULL                              -- open orders only
  AND RequestedShipDate < CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)  -- past due
  AND SKU != 'PALLETSLIPCHG'                       -- exclude charge lines
ORDER BY RequestedShipDate
Which orders are currently on NP hold?:
SELECT OrderNumber, LineNumber, CustomerName, SKU, SKUDesc,
       RequestedShipDate, HoldCodes, Company, Plant
FROM vw_OpenOrdersWithNPHold  -- NP holds only; do not aggregate quantities from this view
ORDER BY RequestedShipDate
What is the total ordered quantity versu:
-- Replace 'PLCB' with the actual customer name
SELECT SKU, SKUDesc,
       SUM(OrderQty)              AS TotalOrdered,
       SUM(FulfillLineShippedQTY) AS TotalShipped
FROM vw_Orders_Base
WHERE CustomerName LIKE '%PLCB%'  -- substitute customer name here
  AND SKU != 'PALLETSLIPCHG'     -- exclude charge lines
GROUP BY SKU, SKUDesc
ORDER BY TotalOrdered DESC
What open orders are due to ship this we:
SELECT OrderNumber, LineNumber, CustomerName, SKU, SKUDesc,
       OrderQty, RequestedShipDate, OrganizationName
FROM vw_Orders_Base
WHERE ShipDate IS NULL
  AND RequestedShipDate BETWEEN
      CAST(DATEADD(DAY, 2 - DATEPART(WEEKDAY, GETDATE()), GETDATE()) AS DATE) -- Monday
  AND CAST(DATEADD(DAY, 6 - DATEPART(WEEKDAY, GETDATE()), GETDATE()) AS DATE) -- Friday
  AND SKU != 'PALLETSLIPCHG'
ORDER BY RequestedShipDate
Are there any orders on hold for a speci:
-- Replace 'BEX SPIRITS KOREA LTD' with the actual customer name
SELECT OrderNumber, LineNumber, SKU, SKUDesc,
       RequestedShipDate, HoldCodes, Company, Plant
FROM vw_OpenOrdersWithHold
WHERE CustomerName LIKE '%BEX SPIRITS KOREA LTD%'  -- substitute customer name here
ORDER BY RequestedShipDate
Show me all open orders for a specific S:
-- Replace '10023878' with the actual SKU number
SELECT SKU, OrderNumber, LineNumber, CustomerName, OrderQty,
       RequestedShipDate, OrganizationName
FROM vw_Orders_Base
WHERE SKU = '10023878'  -- substitute SKU number here
  AND ShipDate IS NULL  -- open orders only
ORDER BY RequestedShipDate
Show me all open orders for a specific p:
-- Replace '76' with the actual 2-digit plant code
SELECT OrderNumber, LineNumber, CustomerName, SKU, SKUDesc,
       OrderQty, RequestedShipDate, OrganizationName
FROM vw_Orders_Base
WHERE Plant = '76'             -- substitute plant code here
  AND ShipDate IS NULL         -- open orders only
  AND SKU != 'PALLETSLIPCHG'  -- exclude charge lines
ORDER BY CustomerName, RequestedShipDate
